title: Termite Treatment in Longwood, Bronx | $800-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment in Longwood, Bronx starting at $800. Expert termite extermination protecting your home from costly damage. Licensed, insured & guaranteed.
intro: Longwood's mix of historic brick buildings and wooden-frame homes makes termite protection essential for property owners throughout this vibrant Bronx neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive termite treatment services in Longwood, from initial inspections to complete colony elimination and ongoing prevention. Our experienced technicians understand the unique structural vulnerabilities of buildings along Southern Boulevard and the surrounding residential streets.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Longwood homeowners and landlords for years with proven termite elimination methods tailored to the neighborhood's diverse building stock. Our licensed technicians use advanced detection technology and EPA-approved treatments to protect your investment while offering competitive pricing from $800 to $4,000 depending on infestation severity and property size.
localContext: Longwood's pre-war apartment buildings and traditional row houses, particularly near St. Mary's Park and along Prospect Avenue, require specialized termite protection strategies that account for shared walls and older construction methods. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and proximity to green spaces make regular termite inspections especially important for preventing infestations before they cause structural damage.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Longwood typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with pricing that reflects the specific needs of your home or building.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in Longwood, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Longwood primarily deals with subterranean termites, which enter buildings from the ground through cracks in foundations and are particularly attracted to the older wooden structures common in the neighborhood. We also occasionally see drywood termites in furniture and wooden fixtures, especially in buildings near Southern Boulevard's commercial district.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in a Longwood home?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Longwood homes are completed in 1-2 days for initial application, though multi-unit buildings may require additional time. The treatment process includes inspection, preparation, application of liquid termiticides or bait systems, and follow-up monitoring over several months to ensure complete colony elimination.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite inspections for Longwood properties before buying?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide thorough pre-purchase termite inspections for Longwood properties, which is especially important given the age of many buildings in the neighborhood. Our detailed inspection reports document any current infestations or previous termite damage, helping you make informed real estate decisions and comply with lender requirements.
